scripts.build:chrome: tsup src/service-worker.ts src/content-script.ts src/popup.ts src/options.ts --format iife --out-dir dist --clean && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs dist && cp src/popup.html src/popup.css src/options.html src/options.css manifest.json dist/
scripts.build:firefox: tsup src/service-worker.ts src/content-script.ts src/popup.ts src/options.ts --format iife --out-dir dist-firefox --clean && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs dist-firefox && cp src/popup.html src/popup.css src/options.html src/options.css dist-firefox/ && cp manifest.firefox.json dist-firefox/manifest.json
